Fellow American,

We're in the dog days of summer. America is back. If you've been to the airport recently, you've seen that people are on the move once again. It's a blessing that Americans are free to travel without restrictions. For Senate Republicans, that blessing is also a curse. This summer is critical to our success. We are projected to have some of our lowest fundraising yet, and we can't let that happen.

I know from my own email inbox that Democrats are pressing on with their fundraising, and we can’t let them start to build a competitive advantage. In 2020, Democrats raised more than $5.5 billion in their efforts to win the Senate majority, which they did by the skin of their teeth.

If we’re going to stand a chance of coming out on top next year, we can’t let the fundraising slow down for even one day – despite the summer travel season. So, I’m asking you this – **[will you help me make it as hard as possible for Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdca6cd90a4d419fa53c2bc611e364d4&_e=Wm4THZeIHmlhsHi3nKTX42Hm-q2XR94TyDI9r9FhbQvnowBTmCBvWTZbXJ2Fs0XIbtQ7V7QmY4qc-OMETmi8OO2k1wQ3AP1nc0YfV_xh-LdKGSLK1sctmC4zBYJ41FHIODyfznsJGeQHWTwgZxgwrqep7SpTPCCYx6QlC8j1IFhyLa5GsiKBt6DlRRSTNL_oT6H1cZxWeEaZah-hURsn2snQjYtiruTc4a_abUa30kozPo1c8-ZG6JXqcuCkTD7dFdkY-7rdbDkphhsOmsUyncBqWhQoMnxM1SzWOt-00zusfK8DjnTZYI367SNyiwleF0a_Vgr9Shm6iwrmLRGz0gi1VPmk-WsaTq3_74HMtqW4dRuRfzh_MxE0d04Z1Q92jGXMKLKlmX7IYtx5h8Cf9btoN8y1f0FgqreC2jBssk5UR4CNWnDwpcNnr_P_MYXxn5DzQOs9YR93TafZtvjEOZmG2AyM801Ure88njHGfVg%3D)**

We have to take it one day at a time, so today **[I’m looking for 1,500 conservatives to deposit just $5 into our Senate Majority Fund](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdca6cd90a4d419fa53c2bc611e364d4&_e=Wm4THZeIHmlhsHi3nKTX42Hm-q2XR94TyDI9r9FhbQvnowBTmCBvWTZbXJ2Fs0XIbtQ7V7QmY4qc-OMETmi8OO2k1wQ3AP1nc0YfV_xh-LdKGSLK1sctmC4zBYJ41FHIODyfznsJGeQHWTwgZxgwrqep7SpTPCCYx6QlC8j1IFhyLa5GsiKBt6DlRRSTNL_oT6H1cZxWeEaZah-hURsn2snQjYtiruTc4a_abUa30kozPo1c8-ZG6JXqcuCkTD7dFdkY-7rdbDkphhsOmsUynQnUtOgHc8pOG6Da6c3qlWAUZ6sqB-NHo53yX2OC1eqSsONMTwzEzBGtg2wjLF01vsUmhZnXO8Xeos1WFWNL1DET0_ZPbRmRvrn1ZDTlqr0-MRRWghcTi7Hf35-0oXo8tFPy0zbLo5Q-3bt_Rkv6nUXNyl1iyTAXrb_PsEhw83FYPr7ytJTv4jGb5OIwCbrO5LsSMJMg3OWbCE00L1Y1xnw%3D)**. It may not sound like much, but every day we’re bringing in money, the better positioned we will be to topple the far Left in 2022.

| [**DEPOSIT $5 INTO OUR SENATE MAJOIRTY FUND** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdca6cd90a4d419fa53c2bc611e364d4&_e=Wm4THZeIHmlhsHi3nKTX42Hm-q2XR94TyDI9r9FhbQvnowBTmCBvWTZbXJ2Fs0XIbtQ7V7QmY4qc-OMETmi8OO2k1wQ3AP1nc0YfV_xh-LdKGSLK1sctmC4zBYJ41FHIODyfznsJGeQHWTwgZxgwrqep7SpTPCCYx6QlC8j1IFhyLa5GsiKBt6DlRRSTNL_oT6H1cZxWeEaZah-hURsn2snQjYtiruTc4a_abUa30kozPo1c8-ZG6JXqcuCkTD7dFdkY-7rdbDkphhsOmsUynT1zxoD-6GuQrVYLDBm7a9_R7oQzVR7p1QFdoPqJg-zPo3v9Q1rIkpxzqUsPFUuAeU_FP-NYGnWK89z2XKPygjpIBzuZtedhas3ia6Hgd1dZ2QAWO9HOkRErvYQbiFr47NsHIIY62NvW-Tzm2z40hYn9f_SOJbVjzTinAKr-ALXlWJgdoIqTkEX2WAR2_jDlzSjj9ZYE9wjGwgBRD0NppEY%3D)
---

Last year we witnessed 8/10 most expensive Senate races on the record books. If that’s any indication of what’s to come in 2022, then we’re in for a ride; If you’re curious as to why my colleagues and I are reaching out to you in July 2021, that’s why. **[Raising the campaign cash we will need to defeat the far Left takes years to amass.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdca6cd90a4d419fa53c2bc611e364d4&_e=Wm4THZeIHmlhsHi3nKTX42Hm-q2XR94TyDI9r9FhbQvnowBTmCBvWTZbXJ2Fs0XIbtQ7V7QmY4qc-OMETmi8OO2k1wQ3AP1nc0YfV_xh-LdKGSLK1sctmC4zBYJ41FHIODyfznsJGeQHWTwgZxgwrqep7SpTPCCYx6QlC8j1IFhyLa5GsiKBt6DlRRSTNL_oT6H1cZxWeEaZah-hURsn2snQjYtiruTc4a_abUa30kozPo1c8-ZG6JXqcuCkTD7dFdkY-7rdbDkphhsOmsUynYDTuJNWUmquvonpluMeBfx2ju8J53KYWhQ1TxcrO61VhyrCKkmxwCKKWnul8RA35DTHjl8P2x7WjoL8nQgotsZBOb2fjwBxqEhD5InXRj2Rsm0YnyBLwiEBRBVcgAz4gjq53RwpDHgVCA5p5_SN2tAoIq902aUuNo4feI4gjWCnIeapWyZ8dCLaKi472HPrvi7So4mFGHzsHRTpTnpyMUA%3D)**

So, in light of the deep, deep debt Democrats are putting the country into, **[would you please consider a $5 deposit into our Senate Majority Fund today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdca6cd90a4d419fa53c2bc611e364d4&_e=Wm4THZeIHmlhsHi3nKTX42Hm-q2XR94TyDI9r9FhbQvnowBTmCBvWTZbXJ2Fs0XIbtQ7V7QmY4qc-OMETmi8OO2k1wQ3AP1nc0YfV_xh-LdKGSLK1sctmC4zBYJ41FHIODyfznsJGeQHWTwgZxgwrqep7SpTPCCYx6QlC8j1IFhyLa5GsiKBt6DlRRSTNL_oT6H1cZxWeEaZah-hURsn2snQjYtiruTc4a_abUa30kozPo1c8-ZG6JXqcuCkTD7dFdkY-7rdbDkphhsOmsUynTlIhGVTpf30YrXlIbBrA8PnnT51CSD1_jfZvppLJgYN_W9lWIS1iRwmdAIKodlMiKA2tHpWUacu9S4gFKDvmkjfPIykpyO1fmw1WVMbo6YR2MibfTEdEY-ofaTzO8-GdPkgH_-n7oAgMWFzJLZHP6hzwubQs4vyBRpcDTbEcIlr_C05CkrBXzUcop1MxGwdJDYba739BrIa79fjFp8NPOA%3D)** We sincerely need all of the help we can get.

Respectfully,
Senator Josh Hawley

[**DEPOSIT $5 INTO OUR SENATE MAJOIRTY FUND** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bdca6cd90a4d419fa53c2bc611e364d4&_e=Wm4THZeIHmlhsHi3nKTX42Hm-q2XR94TyDI9r9FhbQvnowBTmCBvWTZbXJ2Fs0XIbtQ7V7QmY4qc-OMETmi8OO2k1wQ3AP1nc0YfV_xh-LdKGSLK1sctmC4zBYJ41FHIODyfznsJGeQHWTwgZxgwrqep7SpTPCCYx6QlC8j1IFhyLa5GsiKBt6DlRRSTNL_oT6H1cZxWeEaZah-hURsn2snQjYtiruTc4a_abUa30kozPo1c8-ZG6JXqcuCkTD7dFdkY-7rdbDkphhsOmsUynaYRcc2wQjdwOamfs_edVCRVWL6yJKBuQsK40QarFPcxHwXhz2tPPpO42Q4ORnoXseTtQw6Xp1mt2zwgEQ_w309lOK-O-v5tW7gnl0TyNKMlYytdejQMs9lOgDfZZTXXebgrYV58e11tVSaMABbtU4Djhhwub3fi11plDCXHlXlWZmLfglFCsOt_75OWayrorUlnQ8dxkWrKTbW19FwG_Qo%3D)

Respectfully, Senator Josh Hawley If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a899d16451004083bd7cdf8c4d07ef7a&_e=vwUpy88Og5zI_xC7rzkxgAlMe1UPeXv1NoBp8-HF14WB78mLoSxqp77k0KrLyGSEbUiiJX59ZQ9j1JOqzJQVnTXbBewemIf2S1NJRExx5u_OQ-GGDnJF0RZD4lAn55uhD7hSoSsPhCmnSnN4ZgXJCuBhC2in-3xJ0SPYZxMjdR79ZW31wQ_Q9Wf3SCC61wSoJP4GJmTvtPW2XX3QBWrBPLHQJHn2olUreLdT1j3nZLuR5auGK-sZki2JYn9tTkqbrbB7R5-YGK_qYDUmBW7VElQv4H7cUzqFXaMJvFnjxedhPcKKqkCM4rlvuuAOiXZA) Fellow American, Over the past few decades, the Left has plotted — and largely succeeded — in taking over our nation’s most sacred institutions. _Today, anti-America forces control what students learn in our nation’s schools, what students see on TV and social media, what they read in newspapers and hear about the world, and so much more. _ The last year has compounded this toxic reality and shaken our nation to its core. Between the coronavirus, ANTIFA mobs destroying our cities, the controversial 2020 election, corrupt government, oppressive big tech, and “woke” cancel culture — the need to win America’s Culture War is more urgent now than ever. **_It’s time we reclaim OUR COUNTRY!_** **[At Turning Point USA, my team and I are reclaiming our nation from radical forces who hate America, hate our values, and hate anyone who dares to stand up to them. Will you help us reach our goal of raising $100,000 by the Fourth of July with your donation today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a899d16451004083bd7cdf8c4d07ef7a&_e=vwUpy88Og5zI_xC7rzkxgAlMe1UPeXv1NoBp8-HF14WB78mLoSxqp77k0KrLyGSEbUiiJX59ZQ9j1JOqzJQVnTXbBewemIf2S1NJRExx5u-6d2EV9vAv7Z_i557C0zHPMi7WQ9PJkWGmkTIFFEyKVJlIfxlMxVsuWZyAJ7_dz6R9ipN_25iQQ3mLuiDuL_LMQ1oXuF4hKx08pjN0US8mXujwmV2xOcnild7WnYQKUgmoLB7qABvcEqWESxmwA_esfVMoxzWbCBx66Kc6rkfW4XXjeLXIp_FpOlqcfu0xKBDn9hGHOT-BODABLcpgcxH3)** [**Yes, I want to reclaim America!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a899d16451004083bd7cdf8c4d07ef7a&_e=vwUpy88Og5zI_xC7rzkxgAlMe1UPeXv1NoBp8-HF14WB78mLoSxqp77k0KrLyGSEbUiiJX59ZQ9j1JOqzJQVnTXbBewemIf2S1NJRExx5u8QyCc0QYjswbwDk3X-c7CHEIqTKvx3_OpYWedkIjRwiZG25sdzsm9WDmoE_qD7IxqGIgVNcIFCyd6QaC3DVR7NPR_C3mKq2D6VCnrXVYYmjxwY-8KbRL6-EUN6KcbO1466Hh0fe54EodA_4BZWOJHnU7vjq3jWaClyORYPXZC2B-eahjb5S6vlD54W_TRLYMcxmgBb413Mhk8-3d-MwilG) Turning Point USA (TPUSA) is committed to exposing the Radical Left and repudiating its ideological dream of turning American into a socialist country. Last year, we sent undercover reporters into Antifa-occupied areas such as the infamous Seattle “CHAZ” and discredited the lies that have provoked Left-wing mobs to bring violence to our streets. TPUSA documented how Chinese Communists allowed COVID-19 to spread globally through their incompetence and deception. We also expanded our movement of young people committed to defeating The Swamp and reclaiming our country by surpassing 2,500 high school and college campus chapters all across America. **And we generated more than 5.3 billion impressions on our viral, hard-hitting digital content to cut through the toxic lies of the Left with our social media engine — one of the largest in the country. ** **[We have a clear path to reclaim our country and win America’s Culture War, but only if we have the support of Real Americans — patriots just like YOU who make our work possible at TPUSA.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a899d16451004083bd7cdf8c4d07ef7a&_e=vwUpy88Og5zI_xC7rzkxgAlMe1UPeXv1NoBp8-HF14WB78mLoSxqp77k0KrLyGSEbUiiJX59ZQ9j1JOqzJQVnTXbBewemIf2S1NJRExx5u8hZvlbwwWV-VeTdcGLnrPfG-SKiGDeJYO4SGSG6zmlxcOgZeOsOsnMYgac5INHUGg2H4wV0jFnMMdJ0NecnaZWrgh0yzzBo-5x95OYZHySa0sObJ--i7F5DDU1EZyl7miZI2QiqPgFRzWtFll_eYZV906IpVL0qN9_Wujtuf36ga8W0BfvlUKRQXUMhNcptBpynFrMgr8dQbhSKpu6pie2)** The next few years will be an all-out war between **PATRIOTIC TRUTHS** vs. the Left’s EMPIRE OF LIES. **But even in the age of cancel culture and fake news, no one can silence the collective voice of Real Americans — like you and me — when we come together to take on the Radical Left.** TPUSA is driving the country’s most forceful and systematic effort to make our kids love America again through our highly effective on-campus and online programs, but we must act quickly to protect the America we love and bring her back from the Leftist-driven brink of disaster. **[Now is the time to play offense with a sense of urgency and WIN America’s Culture War. That’s why it’s critical you pitch in with your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,500, or any amount today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a899d16451004083bd7cdf8c4d07ef7a&_e=vwUpy88Og5zI_xC7rzkxgAlMe1UPeXv1NoBp8-HF14WB78mLoSxqp77k0KrLyGSEbUiiJX59ZQ9j1JOqzJQVnTXbBewemIf2S1NJRExx5u9yyvqRb33qbSnof04yduArrL3Gf7pKcIttHijxkRMZIa3-YfXJ7gB6xCgtBQaFwxWJA6fLlY5qXhYu06bbFUBjeCFlprHYxJ9pS3yMKI-cZwDF5q--p0kRo1bO3az8wiGg7__FHEVslmBTq1p_cJ1ZG-23KAkLarFQB28FtI2TL9y9v-v_5qVYWQ_Wkv2hp_IH32h3veYW_T7kDciwcP5z)** It’s the only way we will save the country you and I know and love. name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Peter FW: - Our Annual County Party Summit - Thought you'd want to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Peter, Yesterday was incredible. The Indiana Democratic Party and county party leaders across the state joined together - over 120 people strong - to learn more about how Democrats can get to work and deliver for Hoosiers families across Indiana. [_**Contribute to keep the momentum going. Indiana Democrats can't do this without your support. Chip in $5 to help recruit, train, and elect more Democrats.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32244452/295152419/624230061?refcode=CPSummit.FR.07.11.21.&amount=5&CPSummit.FR.07.11.21.=CPSummit.FR.07.11.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGE0ZTI0Mi05ZWUyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6UlCRNNohRN4fhykPhzrkmHa_KBDvB1E3c7UTOtQ1s=) *Please consider making your donation recurring* From the direct relief President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan is delivering for Hoosiers to the upcoming American Jobs Plan, this weekend's County Party Summit pushes our strategy forward to meet Hoosiers where they are and in every corner of the state. Now here's the hard part: we need your help to keep this enthusiasm going through the rest of the year and into crucial 2022 midterm elections at the federal, state, and local levels. body:
| | | _**FOX NEWS BREAKING: National Republicans target 11 vulnerable House Democrats**_
We'll keep this quick -- _but we need you to see this:_

\-- House Republicans are armed with a record-breaking **$42 MILLION** war chest.
\-- They need to flip just **FIVE** seats to take back power.
\-- And they just launched major attack ads on **11** of our most vulnerable Democrats.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: See The MNGOP’s Attack On YOU?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Did you see what the Chairwoman of the MNGOP just said about you and me? [Alpha News received a recording](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkDgYl6JgUTLG0M1jUe5NlcgCPrSjuJs3bsgkc7jT9e8I34KiDHJBr2SrcU0ilklYWRQaKynD4XNzjY7ESbwW_k5TAeQw7JTv4NU9YZ3F_JJqvIhLC-S9Mu0mOy-e9Yxz1w&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=2) this week of a Republican party meeting with Crazy Chairwoman Carnahan and well known RINO Rep Keith Franke. In that audio they talked about "purging" Action 4 Liberty supporters from the Republican Party. **Crazy Carnahan stated that Action 4 Liberty supporters "need to go away" and people in the GOP should "stop paying attention to these people" because that gives them "power."** RINO Keith Franke was then heard saying "the crap that they do to divide us, to pick off the more moderate members. We need those members, we need members like me." Can you believe this? These are the people running the MNGOP! No wonder why Walz keeps running circles around these weaklings. It's crystal clear they don't want STRONG CONSERVATIVES like you and me inside their ranks. To make things even crazier, Franke asserted "half of [Action 4 Liberty’s] money comes from the DFL, secretly, because it has to." What these guys don't understand is that our support comes from thousands of people like you who are fed up with do-nothing, weak Republicans who constantly lose to the Radical Left. Not from Democrats! **Crazy Chair Carnahan and the RINOS would love nothing more than to see us defunded. YOU HAVE THE POWER to destroy their evil dream with another donation to Action 4 Liberty - the one team standing up to the Political Class that's destroying our state.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=3 "Support Action 4 Liberty") [Support Action 4 Liberty](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=3)
---
While RINO politicians and the crazy person running the MNGOP want to continue attacking you, our team is busy putting pressure on politicians on your behalf.
We still have door knocking teams on the ground, alerting voters of how to make sure Walz' Emergency Powers never happen again.
We've knocked on over 40,000 doors so far this year, made over 55,000 phone calls to targeted districts across the state and continue building an online presence that influences hundreds of thousands of Minnesota voters.
[**Supporting Action 4 Liberty**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=4) is different than supporting the MNGOP. With us, you at least get results!
**Despite efforts by RINOs like Franke, we were able to catapult Ending Walz' Emergency Powers to the top issue at the Capitol. We refused to compromise because this issue was too important to you. That's why Walz' Emergency was terminated.**
Unfortunately Weakling Paul Gazelka sold out on us by passing Walz' budget without passing Mort's **Never Again Bill** first. He didn't even get election integrity passed in the final deal.
We MUST pass his **Never Again Bil** l so we don't get a repeat of the last 15 months!
However, if it was up to Crazy Chair Carnahan and RINOs like Keith Franke, we'd never get there.
They'll do everything in their power to get rid of guys like Rep Erik Mortensen. Remember when [Carnahan REFUSED to support the more conservative candidates](https://www.action4liberty.com/carnahan_swamp_team?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=5) in the 2020 primary?
Fortunately, Action 4 Liberty supporters have volunteered their time, money and effort to getting better candidates elected.
**That's why Rep Erik Mortensen was the ONLY Republican elected in the metro area in 2020 who had never served in office before. And the Party spent zero dollars to help him.**
Mort was ONLY successful because of supporters like YOU!
Peter, it's crystal clear that we are under attack by both the Republican and Democrat Establishment (is there a difference?). They want to see us go away. But this mission is too important to let them win.
YOU HAVE THE POWER to send them a message that we are here to stay.
[**Supporting Action 4 Liberty**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=6) ensures the conservative agenda advances in Minnesota. We're the one team standing up to the Political Class in this state!
Let's continue building a massive liberty movement in this state to STOP government encroachment on our liberties. Let's make sure Unilateral Emergency Powers NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN!
When You and I pour everything into these battles, good things happen.
**> >> In 2020 - Liberty Champion Rep. Erik Mortensen elected despite MNGOP's lack of support**
**> >> In 2021 - Walz' Emergency Terminated despite RINOs resisting the whole way**
**All of your help and support is paying off BIG TIME!**
Let's STOP Crazy Chair Carnahan's dream of purging conservatives like you from politics.
**[Please support Action 4 Liberty with a donation of $100, $50 or $25. OR...really send a message to Crazy Chair Carnahan and the RINOs by becoming a monthly donor to Action 4 Liberty by clicking on the "monthly" box on the donation link](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mngop_chair_wants_you_out&n=7).**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Can you locate your town on either of these maps, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Every single dot on these maps represent the location of a grassroots supporter of John Fetterman for U.S. Senate:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210711-1964-header&t=1&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)
Peter,
I know it's a Sunday, but I wanted to take a second to show you something *really* special.
Take a look at this map. Every single dot represents the location of a grassroots supporter of John Fetterman for U.S. Senate:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22040?refcode=em20210711-1964&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)
That's a pretty great looking map of the Commonwealth. It also makes clear what we've known for a while now:
**The working-class movement we're building together to make John Fetterman our next Democratic U.S. Senator is all 67 PA counties strong.**
We've also got pals all over the country who are in it to win it with John. If this looks like a striking amount of Steelers-gold to you, it's because there's actually a Fetterman donor from _50% of all general U.S. ZIP codes._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22040?refcode=em20210711-1964&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)
**So here's the thing, Peter: According to the records we have on file, you haven't contributed to support our grassroots campaign just yet.****But we'd LOVE if you'd be willing to represent your area on this map of our grassroots support.** So on behalf of John, Gisele, and all of us on Team Fetterman, I have to ask:
[**_Will you donate your very first $5 to make your mark on this campaign? We're headed into a really high-stakes third quarter in the most competitive Senate race in the country, so we'd be forever grateful if you'd make your mark on this historic campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22040?refcode=em20210711-1964&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22040?refcode=em20210711-1964&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)**
Thank you for being a part of this people-powered campaign, Peter. We truly couldn't do any of this without you.
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. Okay just one last fun fact, then I'll let you get on with your weekend: **If all Fetterman donors stood side by side, hands outstretched, they could form an unbroken line from the Pennsylvania State Capitol in Harrisburg to the Capitol Building in Washington, D.C.** John thinks it's pretty fitting! [** _If you're fired up to help John make it from Harrisburg to Washington to represent PA's working families in the Senate, then please contribute your very first $5 right now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22040?refcode=em20210711-1964&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210711-1964-footer&t=26&refcode2=1964_434096_KdfgZG&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1964%2E434096%2EKdfgZG)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: What are your 2021 priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We want to know where our voters stand. Survey enclosed. | | | |
---
| | | Friend,

We are reaching out to you today to find out **_what issues are important to you and your family._**
---
| Ever since Congressman LaTurner was sworn in, he’s been fighting for our conservative values in Washington DC. body:

---
I am worried that our kids are growing up to hate their country. They are told that the United States is irredeemably evil.

**Our country needs individuals to stand up and promote President Trump’s 1776 Commission that teaches our children to be proud of our country, and not the revisionary 1619 Project being pushed by radical groups like BLM and The Squad.**

**The 1619 project is a page from Karl Marx’s Communist Manifesto aimed at re-writing our country's history and shaming our children by re-opening racial wounds.**
| [**STAND UP FOR AMERICA**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=cca8d5cb2a57499eae70ddb44891c2bb&_e=R26sf_gGn9eKTPV15LcDenA2FPzKDlViRQmkDJyk5uvRdhj2ATxxzLt_NJk6zIWiid2D_mo_pE_h3whNtLjJU1R0X605r0qgB5qeF1ZW0h_MJI7c41FGBQpiX_yT9gCb-umc0abCit9hNCyDRnpu0v2U6wniKy9cn_3QVhEYK_MzAY9HE7LWRFWB6FOr1O_UemtM0wf3mvUi_qeLNRoxKcEYzbtmKL9AANfsbJMUwPuJwNdgy5QzkZl4QNbdQvPtXC-2IMTX6cJONeqM-n8Eb3c6kcGNoHw3Iqbb3CxTRYk5Y20WU-zk1gcC7lMr_jLph1i8Be6qw1sZpgnu51-FrxJTcvZhO7V_1ZIraCN7h0f-0HEifVQpycID3Z4w_T1mkko_Mvaoa76Vp6pNin5-lzPEpXPGUXsTpizpStCV1tlRXTPgWW4tQI-ms4L_yaKhcVzQTnihFm92Tk8OzFtVmX1sqk3OyFuIdPnWxX9DwRQ%3D)
---

**[Liberals, moderates, and conservatives should unite behind this simple proposition: BRING BACK PATRIOTISM](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=cca8d5cb2a57499eae70ddb44891c2bb&_e=R26sf_gGn9eKTPV15LcDenA2FPzKDlViRQmkDJyk5uvRdhj2ATxxzLt_NJk6zIWiid2D_mo_pE_h3whNtLjJU1R0X605r0qgB5qeF1ZW0h_MJI7c41FGBQpiX_yT9gCb-umc0abCit9hNCyDRnpu0v2U6wniKy9cn_3QVhEYK_MzAY9HE7LWRFWB6FOr1O_UemtM0wf3mvUi_qeLNRoxKcEYzbtmKL9AANfsbJMUwPuJwNdgy5QzkZl4QNbdQvPtXC-2IMTX6cJONeqM-n8Ebx48ODQZIZCt8TU2ptR9Wo2ghvTFz-vMRi5CPXAS0XVUwW0_rbRHYtgKlsZbL-V8czhggpg3l_SOtigFRLUR9u3SZcTxuMTgxSETNV-S58ejMKFwCNu-GPLD_eOeDufh7U5fH4KA4AteDZ8Y20jlF99VEGbqMJ2w2e4swzhxVHLNBuAG-Tca-kjQUkAuj2l6SDzP-3pi5nzc_Cq-_-m6usQ%3D)**

We need to stop the left's continuing attempt to divide America based on race and economics. , They want to rename our schools and streets, and they want to censor works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” I’ve had enough, and I am going to continue to push back.

God Bless America,

Nicole Malliotakis
